title: Login success with Remember Me enabled redirects to Home
description: Verifies a user can log in with valid credentials, enable Remember Me, and land on the Home dashboard.

steps.description: Type "{{LOGIN_USER}}" into the login/username input field
Type "{{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}" into the password input field

title: Invalid credentials show an error message
description: Verifies incorrect username/password shows an invalid-credentials error and does not navigate to Home.

steps.description: Type "not_a_real_user_12345" into the login/username input field
Type "wrong_password" into the password input field

title: Required field validation when username is missing
description: Verifies the login form prevents submission and shows a validation message when username is empty.

steps.description: Type "{{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}" into the password input field

title: Required field validation when password is missing
description: Verifies the login form prevents submission and shows a validation message when password is empty.

steps.description: Type "{{LOGIN_USER}}" into the login/username input field

title: Password masking on the login screen
description: Verifies the password field is present and appears as a password input (masked) to the user.

steps.description: Verify element "password input field" is visible
Type "some_password_text" into the password input field
Verify element "password input field" is visible

title: Remember Me toggle can be switched on and off before submit
description: Verifies the Remember Me checkbox can be toggled multiple times without errors before submitting login.

steps.description: Verify element "remember me checkbox" is visible
Verify element "remember me checkbox" is visible

title: Navigate from Home to Pedidos via sidebar
description: Verifies a logged-in user can open the Orders module by using the Home sidebar navigation.

steps.description: Click on "Pedidos" in the sidebar menu

title: Navigate from Home to Sincronización via sidebar
description: Verifies a logged-in user can open the Synchronization module by using the Home sidebar navigation.

steps.description: Click on "Sincronización" in the sidebar menu

title: Sidebar shows module items appropriate to logged-in user (smoke)
description: Verifies the Home dashboard renders a visible sidebar with at least one expected module entry for a logged-in user.

title: After login, user can reach Home and see main dashboard content
description: Verifies successful login lands on Home and key dashboard UI elements are visible.

title: Home sidebar navigation remains usable after scrolling
description: Verifies sidebar navigation is still accessible after scrolling the Home dashboard content.

steps.description: Scroll to the bottom of the Home dashboard
Click on "Pedidos" in the sidebar menu

title: Create a new order with at least one item and verify it appears in the orders list view
description: Verifies a user can create an order by selecting products, adding items, saving, and then seeing the new order in the orders list view.

steps.description: Type "{{LOGIN_USER}}" into the username or email field
Click on "Pedidos" in the main navigation menu
Click on the "Create New Order" button
Click on the product search field
Type "a" into the product search field
Verify element "Product search results list" is visible
Click on the first product in the search results
Click on the "Add item" or "Add" button
Verify element "Order items list" is visible
Click on the client selection field
Verify element "Client selection list" is visible
Click on the first client in the client selection list
Click on the payment terms field
Verify element "Payment terms options" is visible
Click on the first payment terms option

title: View orders list from Pedidos entry screen
description: Verifies the user can access and view the orders list from the Pedidos section.

steps.description: Type "{{LOGIN_USER}}" into the username or email field
Click on "Pedidos" in the main navigation menu

title: Attempt to save a new order without items and verify validation error is shown
description: Verifies saving an order without adding items shows the 'Add at least one item' validation and stays on the order form.

steps.description: Type "{{LOGIN_USER}}" into the username or email field
Click on "Pedidos" in the main navigation menu
Click on the "Create New Order" button
Verify text "Add at least one item" is visible

title: Search for products in the order form and verify results are displayed
description: Verifies product search within the order form returns visible results that can be selected.

steps.description: Type "{{LOGIN_USER}}" into the username or email field
Click on "Pedidos" in the main navigation menu
Click on the "Create New Order" button
Click on the product search field
Type "a" into the product search field
Verify element "Product search results list" is visible
Click on the first product in the search results

title: Add an item to an order and verify it appears in the order items list
description: Verifies a user can add a searched product as an order item and see it listed in the order form.

steps.description: Type "{{LOGIN_USER}}" into the username or email field
Click on "Pedidos" in the main navigation menu
Click on the "Create New Order" button
Click on the product search field
Type "a" into the product search field
Click on the first product in the search results
Click on the "Add item" or "Add" button
Verify element "Order items list" is visible
Verify element "Order item row" is visible

title: Save a new order and verify it is visible in Pedidos list view
description: Verifies saving an order results in an entry shown in the orders list view screen.

steps.description: Type "{{LOGIN_USER}}" into the username or email field
Click on "Pedidos" in the main navigation menu
Click on the "Create New Order" button
Click on the product search field
Type "a" into the product search field
Click on the first product in the search results
Click on the "Add item" or "Add" button

title: Search clients and open a client to view details
description: Verifies that a user can search within the clients list and open a client to see the client detail screen.

steps.description: Type "{{LOGIN_USER}}" into the username or email field
Click on "Clientes" in the main menu
Type "a" into the clients search input

title: From search results, open a client and verify details are shown
description: Verifies that tapping a client from the filtered list opens the client detail view and displays identifying information.

steps.description: Type "{{LOGIN_USER}}" into the username or email field
Click on "Clientes" in the main menu
Type "a" into the clients search input
Click the first client entry in the clients list

title: Client details screen shows core client information
description: Verifies that the client detail view renders visible client information after selecting a client from the list.

steps.description: Type "{{LOGIN_USER}}" into the username or email field
Click on "Clientes" in the main menu
Click the first client entry in the clients list
Verify element "Client details section" is visible

title: Create a potential client with required fields and see it in the list
description: Verifies that a user can create a potential client by filling required fields and saving, and then see it appear in the clients list.

steps.description: Type "{{LOGIN_USER}}" into the username or email field
Click on "Clientes" in the main menu

title: Save a new potential client and confirm success returns to clients list
description: Verifies that saving a new potential client results in a visible confirmation and returns to a list where the new client can be found.

steps.description: Type "{{LOGIN_USER}}" into the username or email field
Click on "Clientes" in the main menu
Type "Cliente Potencial QA" into the "Name" field

title: Find the newly created potential client using search
description: Verifies that a newly created potential client can be located from the clients list using the search input.

steps.description: Type "{{LOGIN_USER}}" into the username or email field
Click on "Clientes" in the main menu
Type "Cliente Potencial QA" into the "Name" field

title: Attempt to create potential client with missing required fields shows validation errors
description: Verifies that the form blocks saving and shows visible validation errors when required fields are not completed.

steps.description: Type "{{LOGIN_USER}}" into the username or email field
Click on "Clientes" in the main menu

title: Validation errors remain until required fields are provided
description: Verifies that after a failed save due to missing required fields, filling a required field reduces or clears the visible validation errors.

steps.description: Type "{{LOGIN_USER}}" into the username or email field
Click on "Clientes" in the main menu
Type "Cliente Potencial QA" into the "Name" field

title: Browse product list, search, and open product details
description: Verifies that a user can browse the product list, filter via search, and open a product details view.

steps.description: Click on "Productos" in the app navigation/menu
Click on "Ver lista" or "Lista de productos" to open the product list

title: Filter product list using search input
description: Verifies that searching filters the visible product list results.

steps.description: Click on "Productos" in the app navigation/menu
Click on "Ver lista" or "Lista de productos" to open the product list
Type "a" into the search products input

title: Open product details from filtered results
description: Verifies that selecting a product from filtered results navigates to a product details view.

steps.description: Click on "Productos" in the app navigation/menu
Click on "Ver lista" or "Lista de productos" to open the product list
Type "a" into the search products input
Click the first visible product in the results list

title: Search for a non-existent product shows no results state
description: Verifies that searching for a product that does not exist displays a no-results message/state.

steps.description: Click on "Productos" in the app navigation/menu
Click on "Ver lista" or "Lista de productos" to open the product list
Type "ZZZ_NON_EXISTENT_PRODUCT_123" into the search products input

title: Clear search restores product list results
description: Verifies the user can clear the search term and see the product list return to a non-empty state.

steps.description: Click on "Productos" in the app navigation/menu
Click on "Ver lista" or "Lista de productos" to open the product list
Type "ZZZ_NON_EXISTENT_PRODUCT_123" into the search products input

title: Attempt to view product details when catalog/master data is unavailable
description: Verifies the UI communicates that product data is unavailable and suggests synchronization when master data is not synced.

steps.description: Click on "Productos" in the app navigation/menu
Click on "Ver lista" or "Lista de productos" to open the product list

title: Products entry screen provides access to product list view
description: Verifies that the Productos entry screen exposes a clear path to the product list page.

steps.description: Click on "Productos" in the app navigation/menu

title: Search input is present and usable on the product list view
description: Verifies that the product list page exposes a search control the user can interact with.

steps.description: Click on "Productos" in the app navigation/menu
Click on "Ver lista" or "Lista de productos" to open the product list
Type "test" into the search products input

title: Successful synchronization completes and shows Success status
description: Verifies a user can trigger a sync and see the status progress from In progress to Success.

steps.description: Click on "Synchronization" in the app navigation menu

title: Sync screen shows initial status and guidance before running sync
description: Verifies the Synchronization page loads and presents status information before a sync is started.

steps.description: Click on "Synchronization" in the app navigation menu

title: Create a new visit and confirm it appears in the visits list
description: Verifies a user can create a visit, save it, and see it listed afterward.

steps.description: Click on "Visitas" in the main navigation/menu

title: Save a visit with required details and verify it is stored and listed
description: Verifies saving a visit persists it locally and shows it in the visits list view.

steps.description: Click on "Visitas" in the main navigation/menu
Type "Visita de prueba" into the visit description/notes field

title: Open the visits list from Visitas and verify list screen is displayed
description: Verifies the user can reach the visits list view from the Visitas section.

steps.description: Click on "Visitas" in the main navigation/menu
Click on "Lista de visitas" (View visits list)

title: Attempt to save a visit without required fields and verify validation error
description: Verifies required-field validation prevents saving and keeps the user on the visit form.

steps.description: Click on "Visitas" in the main navigation/menu

title: Validation failure keeps user on the visit form screen
description: Verifies that after a validation error the user remains on /visita and does not navigate to the list.

steps.description: Click on "Visitas" in the main navigation/menu

title: Visitas entry screen shows options to create visit and view visits list
description: Verifies the Visitas landing screen exposes primary actions for managing visits.

steps.description: Click on "Visitas" in the main navigation/menu
Verify element "Lista de visitas" is visible

title: Register a valid payment for a client from pending payments list
description: Verifies a user can open Cobros, select a pending payment, register it with a valid amount and method, and see confirmation it is saved locally/pending sync.

steps.description: Click on "Cobros" in the main menu

title: View pending payments list in Cobros
description: Verifies the pending payments list is visible and accessible from the Cobros screen.

steps.description: Click on "Cobros" in the main menu

title: Open a client pending payment from the pending list
description: Verifies a user can select a client/pending item and reach the payment registration form/details screen.

steps.description: Click on "Cobros" in the main menu
Click on the first pending payment item in the list

title: Validation: negative payment amount is rejected
description: Verifies entering a negative amount shows a validation error and does not register the payment.

steps.description: Click on "Cobros" in the main menu
Click on the first pending payment item in the list
Type "-10" into the payment amount field

title: Validation: empty payment amount is rejected
description: Verifies leaving the amount empty shows a validation error and keeps the user on the payment form.

steps.description: Click on "Cobros" in the main menu
Click on the first pending payment item in the list
Verify text "El monto es requerido" is visible

title: Register payment with method selection
description: Verifies the user can select a payment method and register the payment successfully.

steps.description: Click on "Cobros" in the main menu
Click on the first pending payment item in the list
Type "100" into the payment amount field
Select "Efectivo" from the payment method dropdown

title: After registering a payment, it appears as pending for sync in Synchronization screen
description: Verifies that a locally-registered payment is visible as pending upload in the Synchronization area.

steps.description: Click on "Cobros" in the main menu
Click on the first pending payment item in the list
Type "75" into the payment amount field
